title: poecilocalyx stipulosa
intro: Poecilocalyx stipulosa, also known as the 'stipulate poecilocalyx', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Poecilocalyx stipulosa include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of malaria, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Poecilocalyx stipulosa can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in antimalarial treatments.
